creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Our vi(1) is nvi2, which was designed to be bug for bug compatible with original AT&T vi(1) with just a few extra features. Bugs or feature requests should be reported upstream, but since this works as intended, I'm going to close this.

P.S. I've also filed bugs on vi(1) that is actually working as intended :)
